name: Project.Commander.BugFix.Feature_SequentialUIHighlightTiming
observations: Fixed premature UI highlight jump during sequential execution. Moved highlight from process_node_print_commands to _check_sequential_processing_continuation.
Root cause: Synchronous highlight fired before async BsTool completed, causing visual jump to next node.
Solution: Deferred highlight to async continuation point after queue confirms idle state.

name: Project.Commander.BugFix.Feature_SequentialBsToolOutputDisplay
observations: Fixed missing BsTool output during sequential execution. BsToolWorker now stores actual output in self.result, _handle_worker_completed emits bstool_output_signal.
Root cause: self.result contained summary message instead of actual output, bstool_output_signal never emitted during sequential mode.

Solution: Changed self.result to '
'.join(output_lines), added signal emission with header separator for each node.

name: Project.Commander.Pattern.DynamicTabSwitching
observations: Dynamic tab switching during sequential execution: FBC/RPCTelnet, LOGBsTool. Provides real-time visibility of command output.
Implementation: handle_command_completed checks token.token_type and emits appropriate switch signal.
Benefit: User sees each command's output as it executes, improves UX during Print All Nodes workflow.

name: Project.Commander.Method.BsToolCommandService_HandleWorkerCompleted
observations: Emits bstool_output_signal with header separator for UI display. Header format: ===...=== | BsTool output for {filename} | ===...===
Forwards signal to CommandQueue for sequential processing continuation.
Located in src/commander/services/bstool_command_service.py ~line 381

name: Project.Commander.Method.NodeTreePresenter_CheckSequentialProcessingContinuation
observations: Deferred highlight logic after queue idle verification. Highlights completed node's LOG file before transitioning to next node.
Prevents premature visual jump by ensuring all commands complete before highlight.
Located in src/commander/presenters/node_tree_presenter.py ~line 1223
